name: claude-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace. One URL to configure; all team and platform skills flow from here.

plugins.name: platform-verified
plugins.description: Platform-curated skills: coding conventions, internal docs navigation, and LiteLLM API integration.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Vendored: obra/superpowers — TDD, systematic debugging, planning, git worktrees, code review workflows.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Vendored: anthropics/skills — create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces.

plugins.name: anthropic-dev-skills
plugins.description: Vendored: anthropics/skills — Claude API development, Playwright web testing, and MCP server building.

plugins.name: anthropic-feature-dev
plugins.description: Vendored: anthropics/claude-plugins-official — 7-phase feature development workflow with code-explorer, architect, and reviewer agents.

plugins.name: anthropic-pr-review
plugins.description: Vendored: anthropics/claude-plugins-official — PR review toolkit with 6 specialised review agents and confidence scoring.

plugins.name: anthropic-hookify
plugins.description: Vendored: anthropics/claude-plugins-official — configure Claude Code hooks via Markdown rules without writing JSON.

plugins.name: compound-engineering
plugins.description: Vendored: EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin — 22-agent parallel code review, compound knowledge loop, planning and execution workflows.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Vendored: kepano/obsidian-skills — create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, Canvas, and CLI usage.

plugins.name: gstack
plugins.description: Vendored: garrytan/gstack — virtual engineering team (CEO/EM/Designer/QA roles), browser QA automation, production safety gates, 48 specialist skills.

plugins.name: getshitdone
plugins.description: Vendored: gsd-build/get-shit-done — context-rot prevention, Discuss→Plan→Execute→Verify loop with persistent CONTEXT.md/PLAN.md artifacts. 66 /gsd commands.

plugins.name: ruflo
plugins.description: Vendored: ruvnet/ruflo — multi-agent swarm orchestration, AgentDB persistent memory, SPARC methodology, GitHub automation. 38 skills (swarm MCP features need npx).
